name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
【New Arrival】LOU MINI BAG top-grade imported cowhide camera bag, Hong Kong purchase ZP mold. Very exquisite! Styled with fashionable tassel accents. Fully leather interior and exterior, with card slots inside! Practical and elegant!
Model: 585040
Size: 18×10×5cm
